name: SPM Active obesity bioavailability study
summary: A nonrandomized uncontrolled study testing whether 28 to 30 days of SPM Active increased plasma SPMs and related metabolites in adults aged 50 to 65 with obesity.
population: Adults aged 50 to 65 years with obesity, including postmenopausal women and men without type 2 diabetes

trial_details.horizon_note: Results are already in the public evidence layer, so this is not an open no-result watch item.
trial_details.why_it_matters: Results matter for Resolution Pathway and Tissue Repair because they can show whether the intervention changes biomarkers, mechanistic endpoints, and safety in Adults aged 50 to 65 years with obesity, including postmenopausal women and men without type 2 diabetes. That is still narrower than proof of broad aging reversal.
